title: YTP: Rodeohead - Kock Police
description:
This is a re-upload of a YTP from Nov 9, 2013, which was removed about a year ago. I made this when I was just starting college, after having met a good friend Ultracslewisjr. This began as a demonstration to Ultracslewisjr showing how pitch shifting works in Vegas, and became a fully fledged audio-only YTP. To this date, it is probably one of my favorite projects I've ever released.

Software: Sony Vegas 9.0 Pro

Original comment stream: https://drive.google.com/open?id=0Byvj7dd-_QPleENwM3BhVnFHTjQ
